testcase.name: testStrategy

failure.message: Strategy: no discount total ≈ 94.98 ==> expected: <94.98> but was: <0.0>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Strategy: no discount total ≈ 94.98 ==> expected: <94.98> but was: <0.0> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:86) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1020) at module11.ExerciseTest.testStrategy(ExerciseTest.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
